title: Two US service members in Jordan killed in Iranian attack, US says
gist: Two US military personnel in Jordan were killed defending against Iranian missile and drone attacks on Friday, the first confirmed US combat deaths in the renewed Iran-US hostilities, per US Central Command.

themes.theme: First US combat deaths in renewed Iran conflict

insights.claim: Two US military personnel stationed in Jordan were killed Friday while defending against an Iranian missile and drone attack, US Central Command confirmed in a Saturday statement.
insights.speaker: Al-Monitor
insights.so_what: First reported US fatalities in the renewed round of hostilities raises the probability of direct US retaliatory strikes on Iran — a potential trigger for oil and risk-asset volatility.
insights.locator: Two U.S. military personnel in Jordan were killed
